channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Patel releases images of potential subject in Nancy Guthrie disappearance case
item.description: FBI Director Kash Patel released images of an "armed individual" in connection with the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie, the 84-year-old mother of "Tod...

item.title: Jury selection begins in trial of Utah children's author accused of poisoning husband
item.description: Jury selection is underway in the murder trial of a Utah woman accused of poisoning her husband and later writing a children's book about grief. CBS N...

item.title: WATCH: Ghislaine Maxwell pleads the Fifth in closed-door House Oversight deposition
item.description: Maxwell invoked the Fifth Amendment during the closed-door virtual deposition before the House Oversight Committee on Monday, according to video relea...

item.title: "Fraud tourists" from Philly plead guilty to defrauding Minnesota programs
item.description: Two Philadelphia-based men accused of traveling to Minneapolis after a friend told them the taxpayer-funded programs there presented "a good opportuni...

item.title: NATO to shift 2 commands from U.S. to European leadership
item.description: Two NATO Joint Force Commands led by U.S. officers will transition to be European-led in an apparent answer to President Trump's calls for Europe to c...

item.title: 2/1: Sunday Morning
item.description: Hosted by Jane Pauley. Featured: Olympic figure skater Ilia Malinin; author and podcaster Mel Robbins; Jeff Tweedy of Wilco; folk singer Jesse Welles;...

item.title: FBI releases new photos, videos of subject in Nancy Guthrie disappearance
item.description: FBI Director Kash Patel posted videos​ of a person outside the home of Nancy Guthrie, the mother of Savannah Guthrie, on the morning of her disappeara...

item.title: Gov. Tim Walz says federal immigration crackdown in Minnesota could end within days
FBI releases surveillance images of masked person on Nancy Guthrie’s porch
item.description: A masked person with a handgun holster was caught on camera outside Nancy Guthrie’s front door the night she disappeared.

item.title: Nancy Guthrie case: Kash Patel releases images, video of 'armed individual'
item.description: "We believe she is still alive. Bring her home," Savannah Guthrie responded.

item.title: FBI search of Georgia offices tied to probe of possible 2020 election ‘defects,’ affidavit says
Trump says his 'Great Ballroom' will be used for 'future Presidential Inaugurations'
item.description: President Donald Trump posted new drawings of his 'Great Ballroom' that he said would be "used for future Presidential Inaugurations."

item.title: WATCH: FBI releases new video of individual outside Nancy Guthrie's home
item.description: FBI Director Kash Patel released video of an "armed individual" in connection with the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie, the 84-year-old mother of Savan...
